steps.prompt: Use the distill skill to extract an Allium specification from the JavaScript source files in this directory (models.js, service.js, routes.js, server.js). Write the result to spec.allium. Include: an entity for Todo with all its fields and the status enum (pending | done | archived | expired); rules for createTodo, completeTodo, archiveTodo, reviveTodo, and expireOverdue with their requires/ensures clauses; an HTTP surface declaring the routes from routes.js with their actor and provides operations; and a config block holding the REVIVE_GRACE_MS value. Validate the result with `allium check spec.allium` and fix any reported errors before finishing.
